description: Detects path traversal risks in C#: File.ReadAllText/WriteAllText/Open with dynamic paths, Path.Combine with unvalidated input. JSON version matches all invocation expressions (cannot filter by method name or argument content without #match? predicate support). Precision reduced per D-07.

flag.message: Method invocation detected -- verify this is not File.ReadAllText/WriteAllText/Open or Path.Combine with dynamic user-controlled paths; validate with GetFullPath and StartsWith to prevent path traversal
